title: P1: Add circuit breaker for LLM evaluator consecutive failures
description:
The _consecutiveLlmEvalFailures counter in AgentBackgroundService resets to 0 after hitting 3, creating an infinite detection-to-reset loop: fail→fail→fail→log ERROR→reset→repeat. No cooldown, no circuit-breaker, no exponential backoff. Each full cycle burns 3+ LLM calls before repeating the error message.

The counter provides no shielding against sustained failure. After N consecutive failures, the evaluator should be disabled for a cooldown period (e.g., 60s) or fall back to a deterministic "replan on any failure" rule.

Source: internal-audit-57-20260701.md — P1-9 [PR]
